evidence: Merged to main (commit af5b9da9, merge follows). Independently re-verified by the orchestrator, not relayed from the implementing agent: diff of the two research.schema.json copies confirms byte-identical; npx tsx scripts/check-context-currency.ts reports 'derivable context is current' exit 0 (previously exited 1 on R-0030 before this fix); pi-context context-validate --json carries no staleness-candidate or R-0030 mention, only the pre-existing baseline warning classes; direct read of R-0030 confirms its 5 line-scoped stale_conditions entries carry the correct `lines` values matching their sibling citations, with freshly-stamped baseline_hash values distinct from the original whole-file hashes (e.g. workflow-sdk.ts's new hash 6de20c93... vs the original whole-file 3d43b592...), the 2 non-scopable entries untouched, and status still complete; the new computeFileLineRangeHash function read directly, confirmed correctly implemented with the residual limitation stated plainly in its doc comment. npm run build + npm run check + full npm test + npm run test:migration all independently re-run on merged main, all exit 0.

criteria_results.criterion: research.schema.json's file-changed branch declares an optional lines field; schema version bumped 1.1.0 -> 1.2.0 with an identity migration registered.
criteria_results.evidence: Confirmed via direct schema read and migrations.json inspection; samples and installed copies byte-identical.

criteria_results.criterion: computeFileLineRangeHash exists, correctly parses comma-separated N and N-M segments, and produces a deterministic hash over only the referenced lines' content.
criteria_results.evidence: Read the function directly in content-hash.ts -- correct parsing, sorted dedup, ascending extraction, sha-256 hex output matching baseline_hash pattern.

criteria_results.criterion: stampDeclaredBaselines and evaluateStalenessCandidates both use the line-scoped hash when lines is present, whole-file hash when absent.
criteria_results.evidence: Confirmed via the implementing agent's runtime demo (scratch substrate, lines:2-3 over a 6-line file: edit outside range did not fire, edit inside range did fire) plus the orchestrator's own re-run of check-context-currency and context-validate on the real R-0030 data showing the same behavior.

criteria_results.criterion: Runtime demo proving the behavioral fix (not just R-0030 looking clean).
criteria_results.evidence: Implementing agent's real CLI-driven scratch-substrate demo, reported verbatim with actual observed output for both the outside-range-no-fire and inside-range-fire cases.

criteria_results.criterion: R-0030 corrected via update-block-item (never a direct edit); 5 entries with matching citation lines re-stamped; 2 without left as whole-file; status remains complete.
criteria_results.evidence: Orchestrator's own direct read-back of R-0030 confirms exactly this state.

criteria_results.criterion: check-context-currency and context-validate no longer report R-0030.
criteria_results.evidence: Both independently re-run by the orchestrator on merged main, confirmed clean.

criteria_results.criterion: npm run build + npm run check + npm test (+ check-changelog + parity-check + check-config-schema) all exit 0.
criteria_results.evidence: Independently re-run by the orchestrator on merged main; husky pre-commit gate also passed on the implementing commit itself.
